programme.desc: Just A Day (Feeder) / Your Betrayal (Bullet For My Valentine) / Change (In The House Of Flies) (Deftones) / Rollin' (Limp Bizkit) / In Too Deep (Sum 41)
programme.sub-title: Feeder / Bullet For My Valentine / Deftones / Limp Bizkit / Sum 41

programme.title: Rock Anthems of the Century: 30 Seconds To Mars / The Killers / Coldplay / Evanescence Ft. Paul McCoy / Red Hot Chili Peppers
programme.desc: Closer To The Edge (30 Seconds To Mars) / Mr Brightside (The Killers) / Adventure Of A Lifetime (Coldplay) / Bring Me To Life (Evanescence Ft. Paul McCoy) / Californication (Red Hot Chili Peppers)
programme.sub-title: 30 Seconds To Mars / The Killers / Coldplay / Evanescence Ft. Paul McCoy / Red Hot Chili Peppers

programme.title: Rock Anthems of the Century: Bowling For Soup / Paramore / Panic At The Disco / Audioslave / Slipknot / Royal Blood
programme.desc: Girl All The Bad Guys Want (Bowling For Soup) / Still Into You (Paramore) / I Write Sins Not Tragedies (Panic At The Disco) / Show Me How To Live (Audioslave) / Wait And Bleed (Slipknot) / Out Of The Black (Royal Blood)
programme.sub-title: Bowling For Soup / Paramore / Panic At The Disco / Audioslave / Slipknot / Royal Blood

programme.title: Rock Anthems of the Century: Kasabian / Queens Of The Stone Age / Muse / Weezer / Imagine Dragons / Kings Of Leon
programme.desc: Shoot The Runner (Kasabian) / No One Knows (Queens Of The Stone Age) / Hysteria (Muse) / Pork And Beans (Weezer) / Believer (Imagine Dragons) / Use Somebody (Kings Of Leon)
programme.sub-title: Kasabian / Queens Of The Stone Age / Muse / Weezer / Imagine Dragons / Kings Of Leon

programme.title: Rock Anthems of the Century: Coldplay / The Black Keys / Foo Fighters / Good Charlotte / Blink-182 / Simple Plan
programme.desc: The Scientist (Coldplay) / Gold On The Ceiling (The Black Keys) / Best Of You (Foo Fighters) / The Anthem (Good Charlotte) / What's My Age Again (Blink-182) / Welcome To My Life (Simple Plan)
programme.sub-title: Coldplay / The Black Keys / Foo Fighters / Good Charlotte / Blink-182 / Simple Plan

programme.title: Rock Anthems of the Century: Yungblud / My Chemical Romance / Bring Me The Horizon / Linkin Park / Puddle Of Mudd / The Offspring Ft. Redman
programme.desc: The Funeral (Yungblud) / Helena (My Chemical Romance) / Mantra (Bring Me The Horizon) / Numb (Linkin Park) / She Hates Me (Puddle Of Mudd) / Original Prankster (The Offspring Ft. Redman)
programme.sub-title: Yungblud / My Chemical Romance / Bring Me The Horizon / Linkin Park / Puddle Of Mudd / The Offspring Ft. Redman

programme.title: Rock Anthems of the Century: Green Day / Biffy Clyro / Foals / Fall Out Boy / P.O.D / Papa Roach / Placebo
programme.desc: Boulevard Of Broken Dreams (Green Day) / Many Of Horror (Biffy Clyro) / Mountain At My Gates (Foals) / Sugar We're Going Down (Fall Out Boy) / Youth Of The Nation (P.O.D) / Last Resort (Papa Roach) / The Bitter End (Placebo)
programme.sub-title: Green Day / Biffy Clyro / Foals / Fall Out Boy / P.O.D / Papa Roach / Placebo

programme.title: World's Greatest: Coasts
programme.desc: Along coasts, one element ends and another begins. No two days are ever the same on a coastline: the only thing that remains a constant is the timeless power of the sea.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Treks
programme.desc: Every journey made by foot promises a grand adventure. From the highest mountains to the wildest jungle realms, treks venture down the road less travelled, allowing us to connect to nature, history, and culture, one step at a time.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Capital Cities
programme.desc: With visionaries, politicians, and activists, these metropolises are defined as the official seats of government. Dublin, Washington, and Taipei share broad avenues, museums, and monuments, but are as varied as the countries they represent.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Drives
programme.desc: A journey by road expands our horizons, allowing us to explore the depth and breadth of whole countries and continents, stopping whenever and wherever we chose.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Sacred Sites
programme.desc: Ancient in architecture and detailed in design, these man-made masterpieces stand as testaments to the strength of human faith. These sites endure as a timeless reminder of resilience, respect, and the need to reflect.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Remote Cities
programme.desc: Brave the frontiers of the world’s most remote cities. More than distant trading posts and isolated regional hubs, cities like Alice Springs, Jaipur and even Las Vegas serve as gateways to the wild places of the Earth.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Iconic Buildings
programme.desc: In construction, only a few buildings can be groundbreaking. Vastly different in shape, size, and function, these diverse buildings prove there is no recipe for greatness, just the fundamental ingredients of vision, bravery, and imagination.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Extreme Animals
programme.desc: Extreme Animals features environments hostile to humans, but havens to many animals. Witness gorgeous glow-worms, high flying condors, parched thorny devils, emperor penguins, and polar bears in this journey through life on the edge.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Coral Islands
programme.desc: The reef systems that gave rise to coral islands support the vast majority of marine species on our planet, but they are under threat. Explore the delicate balance between exploiting and preserving these extraordinary natural wonders.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Mountains
programme.desc: The earth’s fragile crust has folded and faulted, and nowhere are these natural forces more evident than in the world’s great mountains. Explore the highest peaks of the world’s terrain - the rugged realm between heaven and earth.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Marine Animals
programme.desc: From the surprises of colorful reef characters to effervescent penguins, killer sharks, and regal whales, dive into the places where nature reveals itself in some of its most marvelous and bizarre forms.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Island Arks
programme.desc: Cut off from continents, remote islands have become floating arks, attracting migrating species and forging new ones. Take a privileged glimpse into the secret lives of the rare and exotic species that inhabit these lost worlds.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Volcanoes
programme.desc: There are few sights on earth as compelling as a volcanic eruption. Volcanoes have the potential to cause death and widespread destruction in a heartbeat, but they also give rise to new life and ecosystems.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Timeless Cities & Towns
programme.desc: These cities and towns are special places where the past coexists with the present, creating cultures totally unique to their people and their part of the world and adhering to ancient traditions and while introducing modern innovations.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Port Cities
programme.desc: Some of the most stunning cities are port cities - Sydney, Rio, Cape Town - and are also some of the most culturally diverse and vibrant. The great maritime cities of the world bridge countries and continents and unite the global community.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Bridges
programme.desc: A bridge is a structure that’s designed to transcend, but a great bridge can define the place where it stands. Symbols of human ingenuity, beauty, and grandeur, bridges connect us not only to each other but also to the past.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Island Nations
programme.desc: Though many are small in stature, they have punched well above their weight on the global stage. Some are rooted in ancient history, while others are only just beginning to realize their full potential.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Meets Mister Rogers/Draw!
programme.desc: Mister Rogers is staying at Arthur's house! Mister Rogers is a nice guy, but... his show is for babies! Can Arthur hide the visit from his friends? Next, the trouble starts when Fern draws a not-too-flattering cartoon of Francine.

programme.title: Arthur: Vomitrocious!/Sue Ellen Chickens Out
programme.desc: It's just a regular day until Francine starts to feel queasy, and then throws up in the cafeteria! Now Francine is afraid to go back to school. And, Sue Ellen learns that a fast-food chain is taking over the beloved Sugar Bowl.

programme.title: Arthur: The Great MacGrady, Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: When Mrs. MacGrady is diagnosed with cancer, Arthur and his friends all react differently to the news. The kids must learn how to come together to help support each other and Mrs. MacGrady.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur vs. The Piano/The Big Blow-Up
programme.desc: Arthur gets stage fright during a rehearsal. Will he be able to get through his recital without any mistakes? Then, two opinionated friends butt heads! Can Francine and The Brain put aside their differences for the good of the soccer team?
programme.sub-title: Arthur vs. The Piano/The Big Blow-Up

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Loses His Marbles/Friday The 13th
programme.desc: When Arthur discovers that Grandma Thora is a marbles champion, he trains with her so he can beat all his friends. Then, Brain doesn't believe in superstitions, so when he has a string of bad luck, he's stunned.

programme.title: Arthur: The Last of Mary Moo Cow/Bitzi's Beau
programme.desc: When Mary Moo Cow is cancelled, D.W. is devastated. How can television--or life as she knows it--ever be the same? Buster hasn't yet met Bitzi's new boyfriend, but he fears the worst. What if he is a Mom-stealer?
programme.sub-title: The Last of Mary Moo Cow/Bitzi's Beau

programme.title: Arthur: Postcards from Buster, Parts I & II
programme.desc: Buster's going to New York City to meet his dad Bo, and the Reads are coming with him! He's thrilled ... but won't his mom miss him? But, Bitzi gives him a present that will let him share his exciting trip with her--a video camera!
programme.sub-title: Postcards from Buster, Parts I & II

programme.title: Arthur: Ants in Arthur's Pants/Don't Ask Muffy
programme.desc: To excel in science, the class has to prove that they have P.A.N.T.S.--the ability to be patient, attentive, nosy, thoughtful, and systematic. And Muffy starts an advice column to launch her career as a rich and famous talk-show host.
programme.sub-title: Ants in Arthur's Pants/Don't Ask Muffy

programme.title: Arthur: Shelter from the Storm (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: When a powerful hurricane hits Elwood City, everyone's affected. Ladonna's dad is called up by the Army Corps of Engineers. Muffy relocates to a shelter. And Arthur struggles to reunite lost pets and owners.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Birthday/Francine Frensky, Superstar
programme.desc: Only four more days until Arthur's birthday party! But to Arthur's horror, it turns out Muffy's having her birthday party on the very same day. And, now that Francine finally has the lead in a school play, she's has become a stage tyrant.

programme.title: Arthur: Brain's Brain/Brain Sees Stars
programme.desc: Brain's Easter egg hunts are notoriously hard. But this year's might prove impossible if Brain can't remember where he hid the final egg. Then, crazy coincidences have prevented Brain from seeing a meteor shower in person.

programme.title: Arthur: How The Cookie Crumbles/Sue Ellen's Littler Sister
programme.desc: What's a budding entrepreneur to do when her homemade cookies hit the big time? Especially when the recipe isn't really hers? Then, Arthur and Francine would love to lend their sisters to Sue Ellen, who's sick of being an only child.
programme.sub-title: How The Cookie Crumbles/Sue Ellen's Littler Sister

programme.title: Arthur: The World of Tomorrow/Is There a Doctor in the House?
programme.desc: Since Binky's repeating third grade, he's totally dreading Mr. Ratburn's annual class sleepover at the Science Museum. Arthur and D.W. face the ultimate challenge when Mom gets a bad cold and then gives it to Dad!
programme.sub-title: The World of Tomorrow/Is There a Doctor in the House?

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Garden of Grief/Through the Looking Glasses
programme.desc: Buster is in charge of the community garden, but it proves to be too much for just one person. Arthur can't find his glasses and has to get new ones, but the attention he is getting from these new glasses has gone straight to his head!
programme.sub-title: Buster's Garden of Grief/Through the Looking Glasses

programme.title: Arthur: Fernlets by Fern/Prunella and the Haunted Locker
programme.desc: Muffy talks Fern into writing poems for a new line of greeting cards which becomes the hit of Elwood City, but booming business causes Fern to burn out. Prunella is assigned a new school locker, which is rumored to be haunted!
programme.sub-title: Fernlets by Fern/Prunella and the Haunted Locker

programme.title: Arthur: Muffy's Art Attack/Tales from the Crib
programme.desc: When Muffy sees a kinetic sculptor’s machines, she brags that she can make even better ones. Then, Vicita is upset at having to trade in her cherished crib for a big-girl bed, so D.W. shares her story of that same rite of passage.
programme.sub-title: Muffy's Art Attack/Tales from the Crib

programme.title: Arthur: All Thumbs/Kidonia
programme.desc: When Arthur catches Buster sucking his thumb, Buster worries that Arthur will tell the entire school. Tired of doing chores, Arthur and friends decide to invent their own country. Will this kid-ruled utopia flourish or descend into anarchy?

programme.title: Arthur: Just Desserts/The Big Dig
programme.desc: Arthur has a hard time resisting sweets, and one evening his overindulgence wins him an upset stomach and some 'Grimm' dreams. Arthur and D.W. loved it when Grandpa Dave came to visit--but now he only wants to sleep and play checkers.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Blankie/Arthur's Substitute Teacher Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. has one little secret--her blankie. When it mysteriously disappears, Arthur is pressed into service. Find that blankie--or else! Next, the unbelievable has happened--Mr. Ratburn has gotten sick. And who's going to be the substitute?

programme.title: Arthur: The Chips Are Down/Revenge Of The Chip
programme.desc: What a mysterious, beautiful thing a green potato chip is--and D.W. just ate a gigantic one! But then she hears a rumor that they're poisonous...Sure, kids do some pretty embarrassing things, but do Moms have to tell everyone?
programme.sub-title: The Chips Are Down/Revenge Of The Chip

programme.title: D.W. and the Beastly Birthday
programme.desc: Time to put on your party hats and dancing shoes – D.W. is turning five! When her birthday doesn’t go as planned, D.W. runs away to the magical island of Ukubonga. This is one party you don’t want to miss!

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Toy Trouble/Spar for the Course
programme.desc: It's a race to the toy store after Arthur realizes he may have given away his chance at 2 million dollars! Unless Muffy, Buster, and Binky can comprise, they'll be stuck with a boring windmill at the new 18th hole at the mini golf course.
programme.sub-title: Arthur's Toy Trouble/Spar for the Course

programme.title: Arthur: The Making of Arthur/Dancing Fools
programme.desc: When Matt Damon puts out a call for homemade videos for his TV show, he sets off a frantic rush as Arthur and his gang film their lives. Mrs. Molina is a teaching a dance class for kids. Will Francine and George be the next Fred and Ginger?

programme.title: Arthur: Listen Up!/Arthur's New Old Vacation
programme.desc: When Francine's Bubbe passes away, Muffy tries to understand how she can help her friend. Then, when Arthur's family goes on the same vacation they take every year, he and Buster try to make it more exciting.

programme.title: Arthur: For the Birds/Ungifted
programme.desc: Brain dreams of being the first to spot a rare bird species called the green-tailed grebe, making him famous. Arthur and Buster's friendship is put to the test when Arthur gives away a present that Buster had given him for his birthday.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Plays The Blues/Buster's Sweet Success
programme.desc: Arthur's beloved piano teacher is retiring, but she assures him that the new teacher is outstanding--and famous, too! When Buster signs up to sell candy for the band, he figures it's easy money -- who doesn't love chocolate?
programme.sub-title: Arthur Plays The Blues/Buster's Sweet Success

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Rides Again/Arthur Makes The Team
programme.desc: In D.W.’s heart lurks one big, gnawing desire--TO GET RID OF THOSE TRAINING WHEELS! Then, can Coach Frensky work with a baseball team where everyone is fighting about who gets to be pitcher and no one wants to practice?
programme.sub-title: D.W. Rides Again/Arthur Makes The Team

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Aims High/Flaw and Order
programme.desc: D.W. wants to be the first person to set foot on Mars! But what if scary purple aliens eat her? Who's responsible for cracking Dad's cake platter? DUN-DUN! All the evidence points to Arthur!

programme.title: Arthur: Buenas Noches, Vicita/Prunella Packs It In
programme.desc: Vicita Molina has lost her favorite bedtime book – can Arthur help her re-create it? Prunella is already starting to think about college! Will she crack under the heavy load or will she learn to relax and do the things she actually enjoys?
programme.sub-title: Buenas Noches, Vicita/Prunella Packs It In

programme.title: Arthur: Paradise Lost/The Pride of Lakewood
programme.desc: Baby Kate is growing up! But strangely enough, the more words she learns, the less she seems to understand their dog. To boost school spirit, Arthur and his classmates form the Lakewood Pride Committee, but not everyone wants to join.

programme.title: Arthur: The Last Day (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: It's a time of change at Lakewood Elementary as Arthur and Buster move up to 4th grade. D.W. and Bud prepare to enter kindergarten and Muffy and Francine contemplate how spending the summer away from each other will affect their friendship.

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen Moves In/The Perfect Brother
programme.desc: A new girl has arrived in town and no one knows anything about her. And judging by the strange things happening at her house no one wants to know. Then, it's great having a friend spend the weekend.
programme.sub-title: Sue Ellen Moves In/The Perfect Brother

programme.title: Hitler and Stalin: A Secret Relationship: Mistrust and Mutual Fascination
programme.desc: We have long ignored the "intimate" relationship between Hitler and Stalin, this mixture of mistrust and mutual fascination.

programme.title: Hitler and Stalin: A Secret Relationship: Two Tyrants
programme.desc: With the German-Soviet pact, Stalin and Hitler put aside all political logic to let the Western democracies believe that such a rapprochement was impossible.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Building The Brand
programme.desc: Hitler’s fascination with propaganda was born in the trenches of the First World War. There he saw it emerge as a potent tool of psychological warfare - one that he would harness to build the Nazi movement. Witness Hitler's early propaganda tactics.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Power and Persuasion
programme.desc: This episode explores Hitler's approach to propaganda in power; where persuasion was achieved through propaganda and terror, all in service of one goal: the creation of a state under one shared ideology. A new German power fueled by propaganda.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Why We Fight
programme.desc: This episode explores the way Hitler used propaganda to justify his warmongering, reframing it as defense of Germany’s people and borders. It investigates the role propaganda played for both Hitler and the Allies to mobilize their countries for war.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Battle of Midway (June 2, 1942)
programme.desc: Only one isolated atoll prevents an enemy invasion of Hawaii. Midway Island is where the Japanese fleet converges on a tiny American base with a massive strafing and bombing attack.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Solomon Islands (July 1942)
programme.desc: For the first time since Americans entered the war, Marines face Japanese infantrymen at Guadal Canal. In the jungles, two powerful armies clash in a six month battle that claims nearly 30,000 lives.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Dieppe
programme.desc: The Allies launch an ill-fated attack on the German-occupied port of Dieppe, France.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Stalingrad
programme.desc: German forces encounter Russian resistance.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: El Alamein
programme.desc: Erwin Rommel battles Allied forces in North Africa in 1942.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: North Africa (November 1942)
programme.desc: In the North African desert in 1942, American fighting forces encounter the dreaded Rommel for the first time to stop the German war machine.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Burma: The Forgotten Front (Spring 1943)
programme.desc: The Japanese meet resistance from British forces as they advance through Burma to take India in 1944.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Sicily
programme.desc: Fresh from victory in North Africa, the Allies successfully invade the island of Sicily, staging an eventual Italian withdrawal from the war.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Bombing of Ploesti
programme.desc: American bombers target a Romanian oil refinery in a daring 1943 mission.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Monte Cassino (September 3, 1943)
programme.desc: As the allies make their way into Italy, they encounter tremendous resistance at German defensive positions along the Gustav line. One of these locations is an ancient monastery called Monte Cassino.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Herbert Cukurs
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how Israeli secret service agents traveled to South America to assassinate Nazi war criminal Herbert Cukurs. Known as the Hangman of Riga, Cukurs was responsible for the deaths of over 30,000 Latvian Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines the capture of Adolf Eichmann considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust. Eichmann was captured outside of his home near Buenos Aires in Argentina by Mossad agents.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters looks at how the husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how, a half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele. After the war, Mengele flees to Argentina where he lives a relatively nondescript life.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Kurt Lischka
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters looks at how German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how French investigators hunted down Paul Touvier a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Franz Stangl & Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Joe & Kari Ann
programme.desc: Joe was sceptical when Miss Teen USA, Kari, sent him a friend request. Now, after months of communication, Joe thinks it might be the real deal, and he might have found love with her. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike & Kristen
programme.desc: Mike met Kristen on Facebook. They quickly forged a deep connection, but Mike's frequent efforts to meet Kristen have been futile. Will Mike finally get face-to-face with Kristen? (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jesse & Brian
programme.desc: Jesse met Brian online. They made plans to meet, but Brian stood her up. Now, years later, Brian has asked her to live with him. But, she can't stop wondering - what is Brian hiding? (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lucille & Kidd Cole
programme.desc: Lucille led a simple life until she was asked to work for music producer Kidd Cole. Companies were never paid and one day Kidd couldn't be found. Will she get the answers she needs? (S3, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Harold & Armani
programme.desc: Harold found his match with a beautiful fellow jock named Armani. Although they live in the same area, they've never met. Nev is joined by Angel Haze to help Harold get his perfect girl.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Whitney & Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on a LGBT website four years ago and is head-over-heels in love. Brenell refuses to video chat with her, and Whitney is desperate to know why. Nev and Max investigate. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Aaliyah & Alicia
programme.desc: Aaliyah has been able to share her life struggles with Alicia. However, despite living only 70 blocks away, Alicia refuses to meet her as she hasn't come out to her friends and family yet.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Antoinette & Albert
programme.desc: A year after meeting 'T-lights' on Instagram, 'instaceleb' Antoinette is ready to meet him, but he always brushes off the idea. Is he really the online celebrity he claims to be?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Devan & Rylan
programme.desc: For shy Devan, meeting Rylan was love at first click. Devan wants to believe that Rylan is marriage material but her suspicious behaviour is leaving him with doubts. (S4, ep18)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike & Felicia
programme.desc: Mike and Felicia met online and soon hit it off. After agreeing to meet, Felicia stood Mike up, offering only thin excuses. Can Mike trust Felicia - or will he end up disappointed?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jamey and Ari
programme.desc: Jamey fell for Ari online, and he will do anything to meet her, but she will only do it on TV! Nev and Max help Ari share her story, and she hopes Jamey will accept her as she is. (S4, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Bianca & Brogan
programme.desc: When Brogan disappears from the Internet, then returns online after a year without question, Bianca wants to know what happened in the missing year.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nick & Melissa
programme.desc: Nick and Melissa fell in love at age 12 when they met on an online chat room. Now 18, Nick is ready to meet Melissa. But is Melissa the real deal or has Nick been entangled in lies?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jesse & Brian
programme.desc: Jesse met Brian online. They made plans to meet, but Brian stood her up. Now, years later, Brian has asked her to live with him. But, she can't stop wondering - what is Brian hiding?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jen & Skylar
programme.desc: After being bullied in her past, Jen relies on online communities to establish relationships. After meeting Skylar online, they immediately hit it off. But they've never met in person!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Cassie & Steve
programme.desc: Cassie was on a downward spiral until she got a friend request from a rapper named Steve. Two and a half years later, Cassie and Steve are engaged - but they have yet to meet.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kya & Alyx
programme.desc: In this episode we meet Kya and Alyx, who fell in love quickly after meeting online. Are they being honest with each other? Hosts Nev Schulman and Max Joseph investigate.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miracle & Javonni
programme.desc: Smart, single mum Miracle fell for Javonni, a dreamy-eyed Instagrammer. With Max on hiatus, Nev teams up with TV personality Charlamagne to take Miracle on a hunt for the man of her dreams. (S4, ep1)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jarrod & Abby
programme.desc: How do young people who've embraced the digital age find love? Often by connecting online with others they've never met in person before. The problem -- that cute guy you may be falling in love with could be lying about who he really is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Hundra & Emily
programme.desc: Hundra never planned on falling in love with a girl and is risking coming out on national TV to learn if her love is for real. Nev investigates to reveal a shocking Catfish. (S4, ep17)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Make it Unofficial
programme.desc: Jenni plans a 'Shore Shower' for Nicole and invites all the roommates. The guys support Mike's decision to dump Paula and tag along for a front row seat to all the action. (S6, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Shore Shower
programme.desc: MVP is back, resulting in a near threesome for Vinny. The girls struggle to keep the baby shower a surprise for Nicole, and Vinny is nervous about Jionni seeing him at the party. (S6, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Awkward!
programme.desc: Vinny talks to Jionni and they resolve their differences, leaving Vin and Nicole free to resume their friendship. Meanwhile, Mike finally acknowledges the mistakes he made in the past. (S6, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Raining Men & Meatballs
programme.desc: The Meatballs hold auditions to find a temporary party pal for Deena. Mike reveals to the roommates that he used to be a stripper and they coax him into showing his stuff. (S6, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Icing on the Cake
programme.desc: It's the end of summer and the end of a long road for the roommates as they prepare to say their last goodbyes to Seaside. (S6, ep13)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Reunion
programme.desc: The Guidos and Guidettes get together for one last time in a special reunion show to relive the highs and lows from six seasons of outrageous and hilarious antics.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 215
programme.desc: Mariah is sick of not telling her best friend, Jorge, that she has feelings for him. Dane must let Jennifer know he has feelings for her before it's too late.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 216
programme.desc: Justice has a second chance to ask out his friend Kayla. Andrew will finally confess his feelings to his best friend, Liz.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 217
programme.desc: Memo has had a crush on his best friend Steph for 4 years. Percy has liked his best friend and dance partner for over 3 years and she has no clue.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 218
programme.desc: Andrew shows his true feelings when he tells his best friend that he likes her. Myke worries his feelings for Seanna could ruin their friendship.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 219
programme.desc: Alex has been in love with her best friend, Ahijah, for 3 years. James can't just be best friends with Lauren anymore, he wants more.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 220
programme.desc: Reality dating series. Mary Kate reveals that she's in love with her best friend. Stephanie will finally confess her true feelings for her best friend. (S2, ep20)

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 221
programme.desc: Lauren is ready to let Daren, her best friend that she likes him. Juan will take the leap and confess to his best friend that he wants to date her.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 222
programme.desc: Robin is ready to tell his best friend Chelsey, that he likes her. Tyler's been crushing on his best friend Lauren and is finally ready to let her know.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 101
programme.desc: Connor is in love with his best friend Brittanie and must try to convince her that he should be more than her "shopping partner." Gabby reveals her feelings to her best friend Nick.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 102
programme.desc: Heather must convince her best friend Gary that she's more than "one of the guys", while Kevin tries to prove to Janine that nice guys finish first.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 103
programme.desc: Peter's best friend, Victoria is going off to college and he MUST confess his feelings before she leaves. Christie, a hockey player with Olympic aspirations, must get out of the Friendzone with her best friend Dylan.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 104
programme.desc: Alex wants his best friend Anthony to be his first boyfriend. Dan puts years of friendship on the line to confess his feelings to Katie.

programme.title: The Hills: Apology Not Accepted / Everyone Falls
programme.desc: Lauren's turning 21 and Heidi has big plans for the birthday bash. But, before the party, Heidi decides it's time to tell Lauren about Spencer's big idea to move in together. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: The Hills: Goodbye for Now / You Know What You Did
programme.desc: In this season finale, Heidi makes her final decision about moving in with Spencer. Lauren looks to Audrina to fill the void left by her best friend, and Whitney flies to New York. (S2, ep12)
programme.sub-title: Goodbye for Now / You Know What You Did

programme.title: The Hills: Big Girls Don't Cry
programme.desc: Lauren heads to Laguna Beach to get advice from her mother over her recent situation. Audrina meets up with her former fling, Justin. Spencer proposes to Heidi. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: The Hills: Truth And Time Tells All / Meet The Parents
programme.desc: Now she's decided to give Justin a second chance, Audrina wants Lauren to get to know her boy better. She invites Lauren to drinks, and Lauren agrees, despite being apprehensive. (S3, ep3)
programme.sub-title: Truth And Time Tells All / Meet The Parents

programme.title: The Hills: Rolling With The Enemy / Second Chances
programme.desc: After Justin's disappearing act at Brody's barbeque on the last episode, Lauren thought Audrina's days with the bad boy were over. (S3, ep5)
programme.sub-title: Rolling With The Enemy / Second Chances

programme.title: The City: Meet the Fackelmayers
programme.desc: Whitney meets some cute brothers. Olivia thrives at an ELLE Magazine cocktail party & Erin reminds her that the fashion business isn't just about who you know but what you know. (S1, ep17)

programme.title: The City: Hit It And Quit It
programme.desc: Whitney grows cautious about Freddie just as her ex, Jay, comes back into the picture. Roxy clashes with Olivia when People's Revolution and Elle join forces to put on a party. (S1, ep18)

programme.title: The City: Weekend at Freddie's
programme.desc: On a weekend trip to the Hamptons, Whitney finds out some surprising news about Freddie. Erin has to pick up the slack when Olivia drops the ball on a big interview assignment. (S1, ep19)

programme.title: The City: Friends And Foe-Workers
programme.desc: When Whitney fights with Roxy at Miami Fashion Week, Kelly questions if they should work together. Erin expects Joe to come down hard on Olivia, but things don't go as she hoped. (S1, ep20)

programme.title: The City: Forget About Boys
programme.desc: Whitney and Roxy go on a series of dates ending in a blow-up at a club. When Olivia gets preferential treatment on a photoshoot, Erin reveals the real reasons she dislikes Olivia. (S1, ep21)

programme.title: The City: If You Want Something Done Right...
programme.desc: Whitney lets Roxy work on a big project, even though Kelly thinks Roxy can't be trusted. When Olivia comes up short for a new assignment, she and Erin have a huge fight. (s1, ep22)
programme.sub-title: If You Want Something Done Right...

programme.title: The City: Everything on The Line
programme.desc: A sales presentation with Bergdorf Goodman doesn't go as Whitney hoped, but it leads to an even bigger opportunity. Erin & Olivia work together to put Joe Zee on the Today Show. (S1, ep23)

programme.title: The Hills: They Meet Again / For Better Or Worse
programme.desc: Lauren and Jason have been spending a lot of time together lately, but while at lunch, Jason lets it slip that not only does he have a girlfriend, but they're moving in together! (S3, ep8)
programme.sub-title: They Meet Again / For Better Or Worse

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Confession
programme.desc: Relatives of a beauty queen who was murdered more than 50 years ago suspect a priest committed the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Highway of Tears
programme.desc: Since 1969, more than 20 girls and women have disappeared or been killed along a road in, Canada, known as Highway 16.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Father and Son
programme.desc: A teenager makes a discovery that could prove his mother's death was not suicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Power and Passion
programme.desc: 48 Hours probes case of Alabama politician Stephen Nodine -- accused in the 2010 shooting death of his mistress, Angel Downs.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death at Soho House
programme.desc: In the relationship between an Oscar-winner's son and his fashion designer girlfriend, one is found dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Raging Son
programme.desc: A cell phone captures the murder of a Weight Watchers executive by a Wall Street lawyer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Preppy Killer
programme.desc: Robert Chambers speaks out after serving 15 years in prison for the 1986 murder of Jennifer Levin.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hollywood Secrets
programme.desc: The investigation into the 2008 murder of Juliana Redding, an aspiring actress and model and the subsequent trial. Redding was found dead in her Santa Monica, California home

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation in Texas
programme.desc: A report about the 2011 shooting death of Greg Williams, and the question of whether he was killed with his own gun by an intruder inside his suburban Dallas home - as his wife Michele Williams has claimed - or if Michele herself was guilty of the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Alternate Suspects
programme.desc: A football coach serves nine years in prison for the murder of his wife before a Texas Court of Criminal Appeals finds he didn't get a fair trial.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Driven to Extremes
programme.desc: Authorities investigate a case of love, infidelity, road rage and possible murder in Texas.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Killer App
programme.desc: The dangers of anonymous chat apps; a father discovers his 15-year-old daughter planning to run away with a 30-year-old man she met online; a teenage girl is found stabbed to death after making friends online.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Two women fight to keep the man convicted of killing their mother over 20 years earlier in prison, though he maintains his innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Soldier's Wife
programme.desc: A soldier claims the fatal shot he fired into the back of his young wife's head was an accident, but prosecutors say he did it intentionally in a fit of jealousy.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Mortician, The Murder, The Movie
programme.desc: When an elderly millionaire is found dead in a freezer, her decades-younger companion is brought up on murder charges; the movie inspired by the story, \Bernie.\
programme.sub-title: The Mortician, The Murder, The Movie

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a beloved Florida doctor reveals his dark, secret past.
programme.sub-title: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz

programme.title: 48 Hours: Eleven Hundred Miles to Murder
programme.desc: Authorities first suspect the husband in the savage murder of a Florida doctor, but when he has an alibi, they follow a tip on a 1,100 mile trip that takes the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hunted
programme.desc: Authorities in Colorado race to catch a serial rapist before he attacks again.

programme.title: 48 Hours: SolveThis Case: Who Killed Kay Wenal
programme.desc: Investigators ask for the public's help to solve the 2008 murder of Kay Wenal, a former model found dead in her home in Georgia.
programme.sub-title: SolveThis Case: Who Killed Kay Wenal

programme.title: 48 Hours: OJ Simpson: Endgame
programme.desc: The OJ Simpson trial for the murder of Nicole Brown Simpson and Ron Goldman, the controversy that surrounded it, the impact it had on race relations, including the current and recent uproar over race, patriotism, and free speech in America.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Love, Hate & Obsession
programme.desc: In the investigation of the murder of a one-time millionaire, both his ex-wife and his son are suspects.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: It’s Barney’s birthday, and there are surprises around every corner. Baby Bop is practicing her marching because she will be joining a real marching rhythm band and is having trouble keeping a beat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let Your Creativity Fly!
programme.desc: After finding Barney's paper airplane in the park and pretending to fly like airplanes themselves, Baby Bop and BJ are inspired to use their imaginations. Baby Bop teaches a special dance and BJ pretends to be Captain Pickles.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff has many special qualities, but sometimes, his shyness makes it hard for him to meet new friends. It’s a special day in the park as Barney and the little dinosaurs enjoy an Art Festival.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Day and Night
programme.desc: With a little Barney magic, the children experience the differences between day and night!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Layla and her friends celebrate her birthday in the park with foods that aren’t traditionally American.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends are excited about a fishing contest. Barney tells Riff about a famous musician named Beethoven who wrote beautiful music even when he couldn't hear.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Red, Yellow and Blue!
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Riff find a pirate map, but in order to find the treasure, they have to be able to count. It’s time for a music concert in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: All Aboard
programme.desc: Kami, one of Barney's youngest friends, has trouble keeping up with the other kids and she's tired of always being last. She's not having a very good day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Hot! It's Cold!
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play for Exercise!
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: BJ's Really Cool House
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Your Birthday, Barney
programme.desc: Every day with Barney is fun—but today is extra special. It's Barney's birthday!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Keep On Truckin'
programme.desc: Barney's friends Baby Bop and BJ learn about trucks as they wheel out their favorites and explore the functions and purposes of various trucks. BJ likes helping with his tow truck and Barney helps them see what it's like to be a real truck driver.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play Piano With Me!
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Splish! Splash!
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Grace’s food drive isn’t going very well until Melanie offers to help. Melanie comes up with the perfect idea to get people to donate – put on a movie premiere in the caboose!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bunches of Boxes!
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Movement - Separation
programme.desc: When some children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race, BJ and Baby Bop decide he'll need their help. They show him several ways to get ready for the big race by warming up and stretching.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: I'm A Builder
programme.desc: When Baby Bop wonders about the noises she hears, Barney explains that the sounds are from big trucks and machines at a nearby construction site. This inspires BJ to build something himself—a wind-up toy robot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Riffs Musical Zoo - Boats
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about an upcoming trip to the zoo. When the trip is postponed, Riff decides to create a musical zoo. He gathers instruments that sound like real animals. Everyone has a wonderful time at Riff's musical zoo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Gift Of The Dinos - Winter
programme.desc: It's Christmas and BJ dreams of getting a new baseball glove to go with his baseball, while Riff hopes for new drumsticks to use his drum. Barney reminds them that Christmas is more than just getting gifts and helps them learn the meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop can't find anybody to play with her. When the others see her feeling sad, they decide to play whatever she wants to play. The dinos and kids are planning a camp-out at the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Stop! Go!
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff can’t find his drumsticks anywhere. Barney helps Baby Bop explore many different jobs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After BJ loses everyone's tickets to the circus, he learns a valuable lesson about responsibility. Baby Bop discovers a lonely little flower struggling to grow in a shady spot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ wants to learn Terry's fancy basketball moves. After some advice from Barney, BJ has fun while doing his best! On a campout, Baby Bop sees a falling star and wants to return it to the sky.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that he’s just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A-Counting We Will Go!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Three Lines, Three Corners
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ brings his brand-new toy plane to the park. Baby Bop is having a great time playing with her homemade boat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish
programme.desc: When the kids decide to have a Dog Show to show off their pets, BJ feels a little left out. He doesn't have a dog, and he sure wishes he did! A friend from the park shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun.
programme.sub-title: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah has to take a court-ordered drug test. Chelsea joins forces with Adam's ex to fight his custody request. Kailyn & Javi's issues boil over when she spends a night away with friends.

programme.desc: Jenelle and Nathan's explosive arguing threatens her chance of gaining custody of Jace. Corey presses for more time with the girls, while Leah and Jeremy's marriage crumbles.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: After a physical altercation with Jenelle, Nathan gets arrested. Divorce papers from Jeremy cause Leah to reach her breaking point. Chelsea and Adam finally face each other in court.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: What Makes You Happy
programme.desc: Jenelle pleads with Nathan to stay together. Kailyn worries if Jo's move is too close for comfort. Overwhelmed by a looming divorce and custody threats, Leah makes a big decision.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Corey's threats force Leah to return from therapy. Jenelle and Nathan struggle to co-parent through their broken relationship. Kailyn and Javi must adjust to Jo and Vee living so close.

programme.desc: An in-depth look at everything that's happened since the cameras stopped rolling on the girls from the first two seasons of 16 and Pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Adoption Special
programme.desc: Dr. Drew goes in depth and explores the adoption stories of Teen Mom's Catelynn and Tyler, and 16 and Pregnant's Ashley.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: We catch up with the girls of 16 And Pregnant to find where they are now.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Mackenzie
programme.desc: Mackenzie has always lived in the moment, until she has to suddenly get serious about her own life when her boyfriend is nearly paralysed in a car accident just weeks before her due date.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Katie
programme.desc: Once her days were filled with college applications and racing quad bikes with friends, but after getting pregnant, Katie has to completely rearrange her priorities.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Briana
programme.desc: Briana gets pregnant at the same time as her sister, but their relationship becomes tense when they make different decisions regarding teenage motherhood.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Lindsey
programme.desc: When Lindsey unexpectedly gets pregnant, she struggles to find a stable living situation with her inconsistent boyfriend, and to follow through with her dreams.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Alex
programme.desc: Alex finding out she's pregnant at 16 puts everything on hold. Her boyfriend Matt is also growing increasingly unreliable, and Alex considers whether adoption might be the best choice.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jordan
programme.desc: Jordan and her sister were models and best friends until Jordan's pregnancy put all that on hold. Now her boyfriend and her sister are competing to be her number one.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Myranda
programme.desc: Myranda finds that love isn't the answer to everything when she gets pregnant. As her mum battles substance abuse, Myranda and her boyfriend struggle with preparing for a baby on their own.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Sarah
programme.desc: Sarah and Blake were high school sweethearts, until an unexpected pregnancy began to pull them apart. Blake wants to move away for work, but Sarah needs him to stick around for their baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Hope
programme.desc: Ex-party girl Hope is pregnant after losing her virginity to Ben, a guy she barely knows. Hope and Ben try to make a go of their relationship in order to provide a good family for the baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Sabrina
programme.desc: Sabrina used to be a cool California girl, with an athlete boyfriend and big group of friends. When she gets pregnant, Sabrina must start a new life, and hopes her boyfriend will come too.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Devon
programme.desc: Devon wants to raise her baby with her boyfriend Colin, an Iraq war veteran who is still in the reserves. If Colin is deployed, can Devon handle not living at home?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kristina
programme.desc: When Kristina's boyfriend Todd dies just weeks after the couple finds out she's pregnant, Kristina must deal with the tragic loss while also preparing to welcome their baby into the world.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Catch up with girls from Season 3 and find out about the engagements, surprise break ups, crazy living arrangements and family feuds that have taken place since the cameras stopped rolling.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Maddy
programme.desc: Maddy, an all-American girl from Illinois, gets pregnant from a one night stand. Will Maddy choose to live with the father of her child and his family, or move away to live with her father?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Autumn
programme.desc: In this episode, ex-party girl Autumn tries to get her boyfriend to straighten up before their bundle of joy arrives.

programme.title: CSI: NY: DOA for a Day
programme.desc: When a trained female assassin comes to New York City, she really puts the CSI New York team members’ abilities to the test.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Right Next Door
programme.desc: The kidnapping of a little girl and a fire set to her apartment building leaves CSI New York team member Stella feeling guilty and homeless.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Like Water for Murder
programme.desc: A shark washes up on shore unloading a dead body and a bizarre crime scene that leaves the CSI New York team more than puzzled.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Admissions
programme.desc: A high school dance is interrupted by the killing of the school’s guidance counselor. Meanwhile, the taxi cab serial killer is still on the loose.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Personal Foul
programme.desc: A professional basketball game ends early after a fan is chosen for the million dollar half court shot where he makes it and inexpediently dies.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: A teen is critically injured after being shot in an alleyway. The victim's younger brother witnessed the crime, but he cannot give an accurate description of the incident and shooter to the police.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Point of View
programme.desc: A murder is connected to suspicious behavior that Mac spies from his apartment while recovering from an injury, and his ex-girlfriend Peyton Driscoll may be connected to the case.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Deep
programme.desc: A sailboat race to Staten Island takes an unexpected tack when one of the boats nearly collides with a dead scuba diving instructor.

programme.title: CSI: New York: You Only Die Once
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a James Bond-esque gang of thieves who use high tech methods to steal personal account information from computers and phones before fleeing the scenes in a customized Batmobile-type car.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Down The Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: A murder victim bears a striking resemblance to a well-known avatar in the online role-playing game Second Life. Mac is forced to enter the game himself to solve the mystery surrounding her death. The assassin (Suspect X) escapes.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Buzzkill
programme.desc: When a supermodel is found dead in a giant martini glass on a Times Square billboard, Stella and Lindsay follow the evidence in search of the party crasher.

programme.title: CSI: New York: One Wedding and a Funeral
programme.desc: Mac, Danny and Hawkes investigates a groom murdered on his wedding day, found stuffed and wrapped like a wedding present. Stella and Lindsay investigate when a jigsaw covered in blood is left on Stella's car.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Child's Play
programme.desc: Flack and Stella investigate a man killed by an exploding cigar. Danny and his neighbor Ruben stumble on a bodega robbery and the boy is killed by a stray bullet. Danny is filled with guilt because he was supposed to be responsible for the child.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Happily Never After
programme.desc: A notorious hotel owner known for her meanness is found dead under an ice sculpture, and the clues to the death of a second woman who fell to her death onto a school bus can be found in the book "Peter Pan."

programme.title: CSI: New York: Personal Foul
programme.desc: As the search for the "Cabbie Killer" continues, riding a cab gets very deadly. The team must figure out how to keep New York City safe.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Veritas
programme.desc: Immediately following the previous season finale, the team is investigating the death of a woman named Lauren Salinas who is linked to the bank robbery. She turns out to be a friend of Flack's sister Samantha.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Page Turner
programme.desc: When two people turn up dead with radiation poisoning, it sparks an urgent investigation before it turns into a deadly outbreak in New York City when it's tracked down to a book at the NYC Library.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Turbulence
programme.desc: When an Air Marshal turns up dead on a flight on which Mac is a passenger, the victim it turns out, isn't a Marshal at all. The real Marshal was killed earlier and his ID stolen.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sex, Lies, and Silicone
programme.desc: When a prominent journalist named Ann Steele turns up dead at a street party, the investigation leads the team to a life-size silicone doll company.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Dead Inside
programme.desc: A man is found dead in a basement, but the house where the death occurred is found miles away on a barge in the East River. Meanwhile, Flack discovers that his sister lost her job and has a drinking problem.

programme.title: CSI: New York: My Name Is Mac Taylor
programme.desc: When two men who share the same name as detective Mac Taylor are killed, detective Taylor rounds up all the other Mac Taylors in New York and tries to figure out who will be the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Raising Caine
programme.desc: Horatio's ex, and Kyle's mother, resurfaces in Miami as a billionaire's widow who will do anything at all to get her son back.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Miami Confidential
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a woman, the CSIs uncover a meth lab in her apartment and an unscrupulous FBI agent with a secret life of his own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: You May Now Kill the Bride
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a murder at a wedding, the clues eventually lead the CSI team to a local strip club.
programme.sub-title: You May Now Kill the Bride

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Ambush
programme.desc: Horatio's past comes back to haunt him when Julia has him arrested for murder. The CSI team must investigate to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: All In
programme.desc: Horatio deals with ghosts from his past, the team races against time to save Calleigh from a group of dangerous kidnappers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: To Kill a Predator
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must act quickly to stop a vigilante who has been on a killing spree, targeting Internet predators.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Collision
programme.desc: A horrible car accident that claims the life of a woman turns out to be a murder case. During the investigation Natalia confesses a secret history of marital abuse in order to help the case to be solved.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Driven
programme.desc: After a group of wealthy young women's cars are stolen from a luxury day spa, evidence leads the CSI's to believe that this is a part of a much larger car chopping scam and each of these women are being targeted for a home robbery.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Free Fall
programme.desc: The CSI team must try to find out who is trying to kill a young couple who are released from prison. The couple, who become a Bonnie and Clyde type “media darlings” soon discover that not everyone regards them as such.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Dead Air
programme.desc: The CSI team must locate a woman who has been kidnapped and dialed a wrong number on her cell phone. To locate her, the team must first figure out who the kidnapped woman was trying to contact.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Open Water
programme.desc: A cruise ship docked in Miami is the scene of a double murder. The team investigates the long list of potential suspects and soon the list is dramatically shortened when the CSI’s find a large amount of money missing from the victim’s stateroom.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: CSI Trilogy: Shock
programme.desc: During an A-list house party, an heiress is found electrocuted in her own bathtub. The list of suspects includes her musician boyfriend, her assistant, and her main modelling rival.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: CSI Trilogy: Rampage
programme.desc: The Mala Noche gang trial is stopped when the defendant escapes with the help of a fake witness and a gunman in the audience. Delko finds that a beautiful but disturbed ex-lover is stalking any woman who he is now close too, including his sister.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: CSI Trilogy: One of Our Own
programme.desc: Horatio and Delko search Miami to bring down the Mala Noche gang once and for all. The quest to end the crime-spree is jeopardized when Federal agents, led by Agent Glen Cole, raid the CSI lab searching for missing cash evidence, based on an unknown tip.
programme.sub-title: CSI Trilogy: One of Our Own

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Going Under
programme.desc: A biker who falls off a balcony was an undercover A.T.F. agent. The gang he infiltrated may be running "corner-shot" guns designed for urban warfare, and another agent who also infiltrated the group may hold the key to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Death Pool 100
programme.desc: The murder of a young socialite could be connected to a death pool, an offshore gambling boat, and a counterfeiting ring.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Curse of the Coffin
programme.desc: Wolfe believes that he may have triggered a Santeria curse when he disturbs a miniature coffin at a murder scene.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: High Octane
programme.desc: The investigation into a beheading during a stunt at an automobile "sideshow" could ultimately expose a larger cover-up involving stolen cars and jet fuel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Darkroom
programme.desc: CSI steps up the search for potential serial killer who may be connected to a professional photographer after it discovers that Natalia's sister may be the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Come As You Are
programme.desc: The death of a Marine recruiter ultimately leads Horatio to open an investigation into the death of a soldier in Iraq. The soldier's brother claims responsibility, but Horatio suspects a cover-up.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: When Natalia's ex is found dead at his home, Horatio must step into the investigation to keep his team safe from an overeager investigator.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret (Part 1)
programme.desc: John Wayne Gacy lead a double life in the 1970s. By day, Gacy was a community leader and part time clown, by night, he transformed into a monster who chose young male teens as his prey.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret (Part 2)
programme.desc: John Wayne Gacy lead a double life in the 1970s. By day, Gacy was a community leader and part time clown, by night, he transformed into a monster who chose young male teens as his prey.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am the Zodiac (Part 1)
programme.desc: He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s, killing young couples at secluded lover’s lanes. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues and ciphers. Can DNA unmask this murderer?
programme.sub-title: Zodiac Killer: I Am the Zodiac (Part 1)

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am the Zodiac (Part 2)
programme.desc: He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s, killing young couples at secluded lover’s lanes. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues and ciphers. Can DNA unmask this murderer?
programme.sub-title: Zodiac Killer: I Am the Zodiac (Part 2)

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Athens

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Ocean City
programme.desc: In 2002, Erika and BJ Sifrit’s vacation ended with them arrested for robbery. When two dismembered bodies were later unearthed, the connection would reveal a chance encounter that led to murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Justified
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down, leading Lt. Joe Kenda to delve into his troubled past and his connection to the world of rare coins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: The Millers: Hero

programme.title: The Millers: Pilot
programme.desc: Nathan and his sister, Debbie, are upset when their parents announce they're divorcing after 43 years of marriage.

programme.title: The Millers: The Phone Upgrade

programme.title: The Millers: Plot Twists
programme.desc: When Carol dictates that it's time to rearrange the family's positions in the Millers cemetery plot because of the two divorces.

programme.title: The Millers: Internet Dating
programme.desc: When Nathan helps Carol set up her profile on an Internet dating site, he and Ray get so excited about one of her potential suitors, they start corresponding with him, pretending to be Carol.

programme.title: The Millers: You're In Trouble

programme.title: The Exes
